  • Class
    Description
    Venue
    Controls the VenueModel inside the VenueMap object.
    VenueDrawingSelectionListener
    The interface for listeners for the VenueDrawing selection event.
    VenueErrorCode
    Specifies possible errors that may occur during loading of indoor maps
    VenueException
    Specifies possible errors that may occur during loading of indoor maps
    VenueInfoListListener
    The interface for listeners for the list of VenueInfo load event.
    VenueLevelSelectionListener
    The interface for listeners for the VenueLevel selection event.
    VenueLifecycleListener
    The interface for listeners for the Venue lifecycle events.
    VenueLoadErrorCallback
    A method which is called on the main thread when VenueMap.selectVenueAsync(String, VenueLoadErrorCallback) has been completed.
    VenueMap
    Connects a map with venues.
    VenueMapLifecycleListener
    The interface for listeners for the Venue lifecycle events.
    VenueSelectionListener
    The interface for listeners for the Venue selection event.
